subcodes.first_line: O thou who art esteemed in the Threshold of the Almighty! Praise thou God... Thou hast written concerning the impersonality of the Divinity. Personality is in the Manifestation of the Divinity... As to the question whether the souls will recognize each other
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @nearness to God, @nearness and remoteness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as mirror
